name: Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc
address: Ganh Dau, Gành Dầu, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc, một khách sạn 3.5 sao nằm tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, là điểm đến hoàn hảo cho những ai mong muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Với tổng cộng 687 phòng, khách sạn này cung cấp không gian lưu trú rộng rãi và thoải mái cho du khách. 

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 28km và sân bay chỉ 45 phút đi xe. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2020, mang đến không chỉ kiến trúc hiện đại mà còn sự mới mẻ và tươi mới trong trang thiết bị và tiện nghi. 

Thời gian nhận phòng tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng là đến 12:00 PM. Đối với chính sách trẻ em, khách sạn này không cho phép trẻ em ở miễn phí. Có thể có các khoản phụ phí áp dụng cho trẻ em.

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc: Nơi thư giãn tuyệt vời với quầy bar và khu vườn đẹp mắt

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và vui chơi tại Đảo Phú Quốc. Khách sạn này có một quầy bar tuyệt vời, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những đồ uống ngon lành và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá. Với không gian thoáng đãng và phong cách hiện đại, quầy bar tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là nơi lý tưởng để bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng không khí biển trong lành. 

Ngoài ra, khu vườn tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cũng là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua. Với cảnh quan xanh mát, khu vườn này là nơi lý tưởng để bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên. Bạn có thể dạo chơi trong khu vườn, ngắm nhìn cây cỏ xanh tươi và hoa đua nở. Khu vườn cũng là nơi lý tưởng để tổ chức các buổi picnic và họp mặt gia đình. Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc đảm bảo mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm thú vị và thư giãn tuyệt vời với quầy bar và khu vườn đẹp mắt của mình.

Thiết bị thể thao tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Với một loạt các tiện nghi thể thao đẳng cấp, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những người yêu thể thao. Khách sạn này có một hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Hồ bơi rộng lớn và sạch sẽ, được bao quanh bởi một khu vườn tươi tắn và cây xanh tạo nên một không gian thư thái và thoải mái. Bạn có thể tận hưởng những buổi bơi lội sảng khoái, thư giãn trên ghế bơi nằm hay thậm chí tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước khác nhau.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi tiện lợi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong việc giặt giũ. Hộp đựng đồ giá trị an toàn cũng được cung cấp tại đây, giúp du khách yên tâm để lại những vật phẩm quan trọng. 

Với dịch vụ lễ tân chuyên nghiệp, du khách có thể nhờ sự trợ giúp của nhân viên lễ tân để biết thêm thông tin về các hoạt động và điểm tham quan tại Đảo Phú Quốc. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng và tất cả các phòng, giúp du khách luôn kết nối được với thế giới bên ngoài. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày cũng được cung cấp, giúp du khách có một trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện lợi.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Với những tiện ích vận chuyển tuyệt vời, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc. Khách sạn cung cấp bãi đỗ xe, bãi đỗ xe trên chỗ và miễn phí. Điều này giúp du khách dễ dàng tìm nơi đỗ xe an toàn và tiện lợi ngay tại khách sạn.

Bãi đỗ xe rộng rãi của Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe. Với dịch vụ bãi đỗ xe miễn phí, du khách có thể yên tâm để khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc bằng xe cá nhân mà không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe và phí gửi xe.

Hãy để Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc trở thành điểm dừng chân lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn với những tiện ích vận chuyển tuyệt vời như bãi đỗ xe, bãi đỗ xe trên chỗ và miễn phí. Du khách sẽ có một trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện lợi khi khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc.

Nhà hàng và tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm ẩm thực độc đáo. Khách sạn này có một nhà hàng tuyệt vời, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đa dạng và ngon miệng. Nhà hàng được thiết kế sang trọng và đẹp mắt, tạo ra không gian ấm cúng và thoải mái để thưởng thức bữa ăn. Bên cạnh đó, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, giúp du khách có thể luôn tận hưởng một không gian sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn cung cấp bữa sáng tự chọn đa dạng với các món ăn đa quốc gia, đảm bảo đáp ứng mọi khẩu vị và yêu cầu ẩm thực của du khách.

Phòng Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc: Lựa chọn đa dạng và tiện nghi

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cung cấp nhiều loại phòng phục vụ cho nhu cầu của mọi du khách. Các loại phòng tiêu chuẩn gồm phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - miễn phí ăn sáng cho 2 trẻ em, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - bao gồm vé VinWonders, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - bao gồm vé VinWonders và Safari, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn với 1 giường đôi. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể lựa chọn phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - miễn phí ăn sáng cho 2 trẻ em, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - bao gồm vé VinWonders, phòng đôi tiêu chuẩn - bao gồm vé VinWonders và Safari với 2 giường đơn. Nếu bạn muốn thêm không gian, bạn có thể chọn Studio Suite với diện tích 40 mét vuông và 1 giường đôi. Các phòng Studio Suite cũng có tùy chọn bao gồm vé VinWonders hoặc cả vé VinWonders và Safari.

Khám phá Gành Dầu - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tại Đảo Phú Quốc

Gành Dầu, một trong những điểm đến đẹp nhất trên Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, hứa hẹn mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Với bãi biển trải dài, cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh, Gành Dầu là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng những ngày nghỉ bên gia đình và bạn bè.

Nằm ở phía tây bắc của Đảo Phú Quốc, Gành Dầu cũng nổi tiếng với bình minh và hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp. Bạn có thể tận hưởng cảnh sắc tuyệt đẹp này từ các quán cà phê hoặc nhà hàng ven bờ biển. Ngoài ra, Gành Dầu còn có nhiều điểm tham quan thú vị như Đền Dinh Cậu - một ngôi đền cổ xưa với kiến trúc độc đáo, hoặc Khu du lịch Safari Phú Quốc, nơi bạn có thể khám phá và tiếp xúc với động vật hoang dã. Hãy đến Gành Dầu và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại Đảo Phú Quốc!

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Đảo Phú Quốc đến Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Để đến Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc từ sân bay gần Đảo Phú Quốc, bạn có một số lựa chọn tiện lợi và thuận tiện.

Sân bay quốc tế Phú Quốc (sân bay Phú Quốc) là sân bay chính phục vụ Đảo Phú Quốc. Từ sân bay này, bạn có thể di chuyển đến Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc bằng taxi hoặc xe đưa đón. Khoảng cách từ sân bay đến Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là khoảng 25 km và mất khoảng 40 phút để đến nơi.

Nếu bạn muốn tiết kiệm hơn và muốn trải nghiệm hòn đảo tuyệt đẹp này, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng. Từ sân bay, bạn có thể đi bộ đến trạm xe buýt gần nhất và lên xe buýt số 86. Xe buýt này sẽ đưa bạn đến trạm xe buýt Gành Dầu, nơi Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc nằm cách đó chỉ khoảng 1 km. Tuy chuyến đi bằng xe buýt mất thời gian hơn, nhưng đây là một cách thú vị để khám phá vùng đất này.

Khám phá những điểm đến độc đáo gần Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc nằm gần một số điểm đến nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị. Một trong những điểm đến hấp dẫn là VinWonders Phú Quốc, một công viên giải trí lớn với nhiều trò chơi thú vị cho cả gia đình. Du khách có thể tham gia vào các cuộc phiêu lưu mạo hiểm, trượt nước hoặc tham quan các khuôn viên đẹp mắt của công viên.

Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Safari Phu Quoc là một điểm đến thú vị khác gần Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc. Du khách có thể khám phá thế giới động vật hoang dã với nhiều loài động vật quý hiếm. Đây là cơ hội tuyệt vời để tận hưởng những trải nghiệm gần gũi với thiên nhiên và khám phá vẻ đẹp của động vật hoang dã.

Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể tham quan Làng chài Rạch Vẹm, Bãi Sao Biển và Mũi Gành Dầu để tận hưởng những bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương. Đình Thần Nguyễn Trung Trực và Bệnh viện Đa khoa Quốc tế Vinmec cũng nằm gần Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc, mang lại sự tiện lợi cho du khách khi cần tìm kiếm các dịch vụ y tế và tham quan điểm du lịch.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc được bao quanh bởi một số nhà hàng đáng chú ý. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn tuyệt vời tại Giraffe Restaurant, nha hang cooi, 40six Bistro và Corona Food Center. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Ý, bạn có thể ghé qua Jack's Italian Restaurant. Nemo và Seashell là những lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những người muốn thưởng thức hải sản tươi sống. 40six Beach Haus và #JMT Korea Restaurant cung cấp các món ăn đa dạng từ các nền văn hóa khác nhau. Cuối cùng, bạn cũng có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại The Delight. Với sự đa dạng và chất lượng của những nhà hàng này, du khách sẽ không bao giờ thiếu lựa chọn ẩm thực tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc so với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc là một khách sạn tuyệt vời ở Đảo Phú Quốc với giá phòng trung bình chỉ $44. Điều này làm cho khách sạn này trở thành một lựa chọn kinh tế cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố này mà không phải chi tiêu quá nhiều. So với giá phòng trung bình của các khách sạn khác tại Đảo Phú Quốc, mức giá này thật sự rất hợp lý và tiết kiệm. 

Trái ngược với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố là $75, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc đang cung cấp một giá trị tuyệt vời cho du khách. Với mức giá thấp hơn, du khách có thể tiết kiệm tiền và sử dụng số tiền đó để thưởng thức những trải nghiệm và hoạt động thú vị khác tại Đảo Phú Quốc. Khách sạn này cung cấp không chỉ giá cả hợp lý, mà còn cung cấp các dịch vụ và tiện nghi tốt như phòng ốc thoải mái và nhân viên thân thiện. Với mức giá phòng trung bình này, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc đang trở thành một lựa chọn phổ biến cho du khách khi đến Đảo Phú Quốc.

Sự hài lòng của khách hàng với Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Với hồ bơi rộng lớn và sạch sẽ, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc đã mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm thú vị. Đội ngũ nhân viên được đào tạo rất tốt, thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Khách hàng đã nhận xét rằng đây là khách sạn rất đẹp với giá phải chăng. Nơi này yên tĩnh và chắc chắn là một trong những khách sạn giá cả phải chăng nhất từ VinPearl. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ đề xuất khách sạn này cho mọi người.

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc, một khách sạn tuyệt vời nằm ở Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, đã nhận được những đánh giá cao từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 9.0 trên 10.0. Khách hàng đánh giá Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cao về giá trị, đánh giá 8.9 trên 10.0. Với mức giá hợp lý, khách hàng có thể tận hưởng những tiện nghi tuyệt vời mà khách sạn cung cấp.

Khách sạn cũng nhận được đánh giá cao về các tiện nghi, với điểm số 8.8 trên 10.0. Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cung cấp cho khách hàng những tiện ích tuyệt vời như hồ bơi ngoài trời, nhà hàng, quầy bar và dịch vụ phòng 24/7. Khách hàng có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại khách sạn này.

Đánh giá về độ sạch sẽ của Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cũng rất cao, với điểm số 9.2 trên 10.0. Khách sạn luôn được giữ gìn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng, mang đến cho khách hàng một môi trường sống thoải mái và dễ chịu. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao, với điểm số 9.0 trên 10.0. Nằm ở Đảo Phú Quốc, Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc cung cấp cho khách hàng một vị trí thuận lợi để khám phá và khám phá vẻ đẹp của đảo.

tags.tag: Cơ sở vật chất cho trẻ em
Khả năng đi bộ thuận tiện
Tiện ích tại cơ sở lưu trú

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: It's centrally located in Grand world phú quốc, which is convenient to get around. The shuttle is efficient and reliable. Check in and out service is so quick. Also, the staff is caring and helpful.
sample_comments.title: Centrally located
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc,
 
Thank you for your wonderful review and for sharing your experience with us. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our central location in Grand World Phú Quốc and found it convenient for getting around the area.
 
It is also a pleasure to hear that the shuttle service was efficient and reliable, and that the check-in and check-out process was smooth and quick. Most importantly, your kind compliments about our caring and helpful staff mean a lot to us and serve as great motivation for the entire team.
 
We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.
 
Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.text:
This place was fantastic. I stayed here for 4 out of 6 days during my trip and was extremely satisfied. The housekeeping staff always followed my requests (whether to clean or not), and essentials like bottled water and toiletries were consistently replenished.

The breakfast buffet was excellent, and the pool was just as amazing. The biggest highlight, however, was the staff. They were incredibly professional and enthusiastic, making us feel genuinely cared for without being intrusive or compromising our privacy.

Although the hotel is a bit far from the city center, it's conveniently surrounded by all the essentials: the beautiful and clean Grand World Beach, VinWonders, and VinSafari. This place is absolutely worth every penny!
sample_comments.title: An Amazing Stay at a Wonderful Place
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Hong,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a detailed and glowing review of your stay with us. We are thrilled to know that you found your experience at VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc to be fantastic and that you were extremely satisfied throughout your visit.

It is wonderful to hear that our housekeeping team met your expectations by attentively following your requests and keeping your room well-stocked with essentials. We are equally delighted that you enjoyed the breakfast buffet, our pool facilities, and, most importantly, the professionalism and enthusiasm of our staff. Your kind words truly motivate us to continue delivering exceptional service and genuine care to all our guests.

While we understand that the hotel's distance from the city center might be a consideration, we are glad you appreciated the convenience of nearby attractions such as Grand World Beach, VinWonders, and VinSafari. It's great to know these added value to your stay.

Thank you fo
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Hai Giường Đơn Tiêu Chuẩn - Gồm Cả Vé VinWonders

sample_comments.text: Chúng tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời ở đây với con cái. Căn phòng sạch sẽ, thoải mái và hoàn hảo cho các gia đình. Con chúng tôi thật sự thích hồ bơi và vui vẻ khi dành thời gian ở đó mỗi ngày. Địa điểm rất tuyệt, rất gần Grand World và dễ đi bộ đến các điểm tham quan, cửa hàng và nhà hàng xung quanh. Rất được khuyên dành cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ!
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs. Pai,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc.

Thank you very much for choosing our hotel and for sharing your wonderful experience with us.

We are delighted to know that you and your family had a comfortable and enjoyable stay. It is especially rewarding to hear that your child loved the swimming pool and had such a great time during your visit. Creating a family-friendly environment is always one of our top priorities.

We are also pleased that you appreciated the cleanliness and comfort of the room, as well as our convenient location near Grand World, making it easy for you to explore nearby attractions, shops, and restaurants.

Your recommendation means a lot to us and serves as great motivation for our team to continue delivering memorable experiences for all our guests.

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.text: Phòng ở rộng rãi, hồ bơi lớn thật sự, có phòng gym với ít thiết bị nhưng trang bị mới. Nhân viên phục vụ tốt, nằm trong Grand World, đi bộ tham quan thoải mái.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn được gợi ý, tuyệt vời, bữa sáng ngon miệng.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc,
 
Thank you very much for your wonderful review and kind recommendation. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed your stay, especially our spacious rooms, large swimming pool, and delicious breakfast. It is also a pleasure to hear that you found our location within Grand World convenient for exploring and that our team provided you with good service.
 
We truly appreciate your comment regarding the fitness center. Your feedback has been noted, and we will continue to review and enhance our facilities to better meet our guests' expectations.
 
Thank you once again for your kind support. We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.text:
Phòng của Vinholiday sạch sẽ, hồ bơi sạch đẹp, nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và hỗ trợ nhiệt tình. 
Vị trí thuận tiện để đi chơi Grand word và Vin wonder.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách Nguyễn Thị Tố Nữ,

Đầu tiên cho phép khách sạn VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc được gởi lời chào nồng ấm đến Quý khách và gia đình. Rất cảm ơn Quý khách vì đã dành thời gian quý giá của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại khách sạn chúng tôi.
Với những người làm nghề dịch vụ, niềm vui và sự hài lòng của Quý khách là món quá vô giá và là mục tiêu lớn nhất mà chúng tôi ngày ngày hướng đến. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ tiếp tục miệt mài làm việc, nâng cao chất lượng để mang lại những sản phẩm dịch vụ tốt hơn nữa đến Quý khách hàng.
Một lần nữa chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách và hẹn gặp lại Quý khách vào một ngày không xa.
Kính chúc Quý khách cùng gia đình mạnh khỏe và hạnh phúc!

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản lý khách sạn 
VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng gia đình hướng hồ bơi

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: My children left soft toys and nobody of the staff let me know or notice me while check out
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs. Susie,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us.

We sincerely apologize for the delay in completing the room inspection after your check-out, which resulted in us not being able to promptly identify and inform you about your children's soft toys left behind. We truly understand how meaningful these items can be, especially to children, and we are very sorry for the inconvenience and disappointment this may have caused.

Please rest assured that we have reminded our team to strengthen the room-check procedures to ensure lost items are recorded and guests are notified in a more timely manner.

If you have not yet been contacted regarding the items, we kindly invite you to reach out to us directly with your reservation details so we can double-check and assist you further.

Once again, please accept our sincere apologies. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome your family back and provide a more seamless experience.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta

sample_comments.title: Terrible hospitality
sample_comments.text: I would not recommend this hotel. First their check in time is 15.00 hrs. They would not even let u check in into your room at 14.59 hrs. Counter staff was rude, we was traveling with baby they didnt even allow to check in at 14.50 hrs even though the room was ready from 13.00 hrs. Room was dirty with hairs in bathroom
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Vaibhav,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay at VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc. We sincerely apologize for the disappointment and inconvenience you experienced, especially while traveling with a baby. We fully understand how important a smooth and comfortable check-in experience is after a journey.

Our standard check-in time is 15:00; however, we always aim to support early check-in whenever the room is fully prepared and operational conditions allow. We regret that, during a peak occupancy period, our efforts to arrange early access around 14:30 did not meet your expectations. We are also truly sorry to learn about your comments concerning staff interaction and room cleanliness, which are not reflective of the service standards we strive to maintain.

Your feedback has been carefully noted for further review and improvement. We appreciate you bringing these matters to our attention.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Only have appearance but no substance
sample_comments.text:
1. Staff work no flexibility.
2.A *** room have no refrigerator.
3. No housekeeping on the second day when I return on 5pm.
4. Wall socket was not fixed even reported on the first day.
5. vinbus from an d to airport only have drop -off stop but no pick up stop nearby.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Chow Cheuk Ming,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during your stay and regret that some aspects did not meet your expectations.
 
Regarding the room amenities, we would like to clarify that the power socket was functioning normally and was resolved once the switch was turned on by our engineering team. We sincerely regret that no further feedback was received afterward, which limited our opportunity to recheck and assist you more promptly. We apologize for any confusion this may have caused.
In addition, while there is no separate refrigerator in the room, a minibar as our standard is provided and located inside the wardrobe.
Concerning housekeeping service, our standard room cleaning time is from 09:00 to 17:00. Our housekeeping team did come to your room; however, as the timing was not suitable for your schedule, the service could not be carried out at that moment. We sincerely apologize for

sample_comments.title: Avoid
sample_comments.text: I had a medical situation where I sent all the evidence but they did not want to cooperate with cancellation or even cut half of the money and refund the rest and even re schedule they asked very high amount. So just avoid

sample_comments.title: Services
sample_comments.text: Services not good, hotel no Clean, not telling the true.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Ng,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc!
Thank you so much for your honest feedback, however, we are so regretful at your incomplete satisfaction about your recent stay at our hotel. If there is any inconvenience you have experienced, we strongly desire to get to know more in particular, it will be extremely helpful to us to improve ourselves for better service in the future. 

We hope to have other chance to host you again soon.

Best Regards,
Hang Minh Nguyen
Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Old facilities. Recommend the hotel next door , wynham hotel. Vinholidays they charge extra for bringing a kid without giving us extra pillow , only give us two bottle of water per day. Last day are not allowed to take water long waiting time for check in , front counter staff cannot communicate in English . overall not recommend and not value for the money .
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.
 
We are truly sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations and sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you encountered during your stay.
 
Please allow us to clarify that, upon receiving your request, additional pillows and water were promptly provided. We sincerely regret that these items were not arranged in a timely manner on your arrival day.
 
Your comments have been taken seriously and shared with the relevant teams for immediate review and improvement. We are committed to enhancing our service quality to provide a more comfortable and seamless experience for all our guests.
 
We genuinely appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a much improved stay in the future.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Tragic
sample_comments.text:
We have been visiting Vinpearl Phu Quoc hotels for five years now and were always satisfied with their cleanliness and beauty. However, this time was a complete shock.
The sanitary conditions in the rooms are unimaginable. We saw staff treating corridors with chemical pesticides during the day, which proves they are aware of the flea and moth infestation. The chemical smell was unbearable.
After just one night, I am covered in insect bites (see photos). We have never experienced such filth in this hotel chain before. A tragic experience.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Aiva,

Thank you for your continued trust in Vinpearl properties over the past five years. Your loyalty means a great deal to us, and we are truly sorry that this stay did not meet your expectations.

We deeply regret the discomfort you experienced regarding sanitation and pest concerns. Please allow us to sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

As Phu Quoc has a tropical forest environment and humid climate, these natural conditions can unfortunately create a favorable setting for insects. For this reason, the hotel conducts regular preventive pest-control treatments in accordance with safety regulations. However, this should never affect our guests' comfort, and we are very sorry for the chemical odor and the unpleasant experience you described.

Your feedback has been escalated to senior management for immediate review to ensure that preventive measures are carried out more carefully and without impacting guest well-being.

We truly value your long-standing s

sample_comments.title: Absolutely horrible
sample_comments.text:
I booked 3 rooms for 5 people --- two of the best rooms (Studio Suites) and one Double Room --- but we were honestly very disappointed.

The room furniture was in poor condition and felt quite worn out. The cleanliness was also unacceptable; the rooms were quite dirty. On top of that, there was a strong musty smell in the room. I even asked the staff if they could help diffuse some essential oil to improve the smell, but they were not very willing to help and nothing was done.

Considering the price we paid, it would be much more worthwhile to spend a little extra and stay at a 5-star hotel instead.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations.
 
Regarding the concerns about the condition, cleanliness, and the musty smell in the rooms, please accept our sincere apologies. Your comments have been carefully noted and shared with the relevant departments so that we can review and improve these areas. We truly appreciate the opportunity we had to speak with you and thank you for your willingness to share your experience with us.
 
Your feedback is very valuable and helps us continue improving our service and facilities for future guests.
 
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide you with a much better experience.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Scammers
sample_comments.text:
This is the only review you can simply trust for planning your holidays. This Hotel is a total scam in the name of 4 star hotel. This is just another basic 3 star hotel. It is just using the name of the VIN chain. I was totally harassed by the staff of this hotel. I booked for a standard double bedroom with pool view. And these guys gave me twin bedroom. And that too very cleverly.
They joined the both beds to make it look like it's a double bed. I checked in late night so tired that I forgot to even check that what I have signed for. In the morning, when I went to the reception regarding the problem. They gave me funny options like they don't have any room available for me with double bed or either. I check out in morning like 11 o'clock and then check-in again in the evening around 7 o'clock. Seriously? l urged to talk to the manager and made pressure on them, then only the final decision was that I check out at 12 o'clock and I got my room with double bed around 4 o'clock. You might be thinking, what was such a huge deal with this thing, observed carefully in the pictures like how that light switch came in between because of the merging of the twin beds. That resulted in accidental turning on the lights for multiple times during the night and disturbing the sleep so irritating. Apart from the incident. The rooms are so mid. Nothing to be called for 4 star. They don't even provide chair for balcony.
Not even a table to keep your luggage on. This was my last hotel in my whole Vietnam itinerary.
And trust me, this was the worst one. I ended my trip with. For the first night i stayed in a Homestay. That was a far better experience in respect of the money I gave.
Don't trust any other reviews just save your money and don't get fooled by these guys.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Suraj,

Thank you for your feedback.

While we respect every guest's opinion, we must clarify several factual inaccuracies in this review to protect the transparency of our operations.

According to our official booking records, the reservation was confirmed as a Twin room, and this room type was clearly stated and acknowledged at the time of booking. There was no booking made for a King or Double-bed category.

Furthermore, our hotel received a phone request to combine the twin beds prior to your arrival. This request was recorded and documented in our system. Our team arranged the bed configuration exactly as requested.

At the time of your complaint, the hotel was operating at high occupancy and there were no available King-bed rooms. In order to accommodate your preference, our team had to internally rearrange room allocations, which required time and coordination without impacting other confirmed guests. The alternative solution offered was based on operational reality, n

Cons: Critical hygiene issues---found moths and fleas on the 2nd floor. Rooms were filthy (hair, dust, stained sofas). Poor soundproofing, constant smoking on balconies, and long queues at reception.

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us.

We are very pleased to know that you enjoyed the breakfast and the outdoor playground areas. It is always encouraging to hear that certain aspects of your stay were enjoyable.

At the same time, we are sincerely concerned by your comments regarding cleanliness and hygiene. Please accept our deepest apologies for the condition you described. This does not reflect the standards we are committed to maintaining. Your feedback has been immediately shared with our Housekeeping and Management teams for urgent review and corrective action.

We also regret the inconvenience caused by soundproofing concerns, smoking on balconies, and waiting time at reception. These matters are being carefully reviewed to strengthen supervision and improve the overall guest experience.

Thank you again for your honest feedback. It is truly valuable in helping us improve.

Best regards,
Hotel Management

sample_comments.title: 별로에요 수준이하
sample_comments.text:
푸꾸옥 숙소들중 그냥 그런수준입니다. 하위수준이에요. 다시는 가고싶을만한 포인트가없어요. 사진포장만 잘되고 빈펄네임만 가져다쓴듯.

조식은 정말먹을거없고, 화장실냄새 너무나서 구역질나고요. 수질은 안좋아 필터색금방변해요. 큰 수영장은 수심이 낮아 어른들 수영하기엔 별로고요. 풀바에서는 룸차지안된다고해서 카드가지러 다시올라갔다오길반복, 피트니스는 너무작아 운동할수없고요.

방은 미로처럼 엄청많아요, 제가 갔을땐 중국인 베트남인많았어요. 저희는 다른 숙소들보다 편하지않아 얼리체크아웃했습니다. 

푸꾸옥에서 비슷한가격에 더 어메이징한 숙소들이 많기에 위생과 조식, 결제등의 서비스등 측면이 개선되지않는다면 다신 방문하거나 추천하고 싶지않습니다.

sample_comments.title: Bad
sample_comments.text:
During our trip, we stayed at six different hotels, and this was unfortunately the worst experience, despite not being the cheapest option. We were a large group, including small children and seniors.
Pros:
• Restaurant and Breakfast: Top-level service, delicious food, and reasonable prices. Despite the high number of guests, breakfast was well-organized, and it was easy to find a seat.
• Pool Area: A great relaxation zone for both adults and children. The pool staff was very friendly and kept a close eye on safety.
• Grounds: There are several playgrounds on-site, which is a major plus for families.
Cons:
• Cleanliness (Critical): This was the weakest point of our 6-hotel tour. On the second floor, we encountered moths, fleas, and other insects. The cleanliness of the rooms is below any acceptable standard: hair in the shower and behind the beds, thick layers of dust, dirty mirrors, and stained sofas.
• Safety and Maintenance: The indoor kids' playroom was very dirty. In the pool area, the fountain zone is not separated from the deep pool, posing a risk to small children.
• Soundproofing and Rules: Soundproofing is poor; you can clearly hear everything happening in neighboring rooms. Quiet hours are not enforced, and the same goes for the "no smoking" rule on balconies---it happens constantly without any intervention from staff.
• Reception: There are constant queues and communication is slow; it is difficult to get even a quick answer.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Aiva,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay with us.

We are sincerely pleased that you appreciated the restaurant service, breakfast organization, and the friendliness of our pool team. It is especially encouraging to know that the pool area and playgrounds were enjoyable for both the children and adults in your group. Your kind recognition of our F&B team truly means a lot.

At the same time, we are deeply concerned by your comments regarding cleanliness. The issues you described are not aligned with our standards, and we sincerely apologize for the condition you encountered. This matter has been escalated to our Housekeeping and Quality Control teams for immediate inspection and corrective action.

We also take seriously your feedback about the indoor playroom condition, pool fountain safety separation, soundproofing, rule enforcement, and reception service efficiency. Guest safety, comfort, and a well-managed environment are fundam

sample_comments.title: Excellent restaurant service, but critical hygiene issues in the rooms
sample_comments.text:
The Good:
• Dining: Excellent breakfast and restaurant service. Delicious food and fair prices.
• Pool & Grounds: Great pool area with attentive staff and several playgrounds for kids.
The Bad:
• Hygiene (Critical): Extremely dirty. We found moths and fleas on the 2nd floor. Rooms had hair in showers/beds, thick dust, and stained furniture.
• Facilities: The indoor playroom was very dirty. The fountain area at the pool lacks safety barriers for toddlers.
• Management: Zero enforcement of "no smoking" or quiet hours. Poor soundproofing and constant long queues at reception.
Verdict: 2/5. Great staff in the restaurant, but the lack of cleanliness is unacceptable.

sample_comments.title: Over rated hotel
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is the most rated hotel since I visit Vietnam every 6 months started 10 years ago. I stayed in 3 stars to 5 stars hotels in all of my trips. This hotel is rated 4 stars and it is about 2 stars in my opinion. There are many factors to come to my opinion:

1) The room is very small, a bed, a small dresser with a mirror and 1 chair. The closet door was squeaky. Everything in the room is outdated.
2) Room cleaning service was terrible, we did not have room cleaning service in the first two days of our stay. There was only 1 small garbage can in the bathroom, nothing in the room. 
3) The breakfast was decent, but the restaurant was too crowded and the food was average. Other guests in the restaurant was rude and loud.
4) The dinning 
experience in the hotel was the worst! We order our dishes and we waited a long time for the food. When the food finally came, the server did not give us serving plates, or bowls for soup. We have to ask the staffs separately. The food was lukewarm and not good. There were about 5 persons working in the dinning room, and all of them just standing around without much to do. They did not come by the table until we call them for service. There was an ongoing dinner promotion but the manager lied to us that the promotion was cancelled without notice.
5) The bath towels in the bathroom were worned out . There were couple of small holes too. Unbelievable.
Overall, I can not recommend this hotel to anyone. I chose this hotel because of the previous reviews from guests. It was the most OVERRATED.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms.Hilbert, 
We appreciate the time you spent to share your experience with us!
Please accept our sincere apologies for the unpleasant experience you encountered during your stay. We wish that you had had only wonderful memories with us, however, it is so regrettable that we failed in delivering it to you. We wish we could have addressed the issues earlier to prevent any inconvenience caused to you. We sincerely thank you for bringing the matters to our attention, we are certain to work on it seriously to avoid similar occurrences in the future.
Thank you very much and we all look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.

Best regards,
Hotel Management
VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

Got dropped off from the electrical bus and there were no signs or staff to assist with check in. Any child over 4 will be charged 410,000 VND for staying, what a rip off!! sample_comments.title: Unpleasant stay during Christmas
sample_comments.text:
We booked 2 nights for 2 kids aged 5 and 9 during the Christmas holiday in VinHolidays Fiesta and it was the worst experience ever.

1. **Booking Confusion and NOT kids friendly**

Please be prepared to pay an extra USD 16 per night per child, even though we included and paid for them in our reservation. We booked the hotel through Agoda. When we checked in at 10:30 AM, the hotel said they only received bookings from 'Booking. com' for 2 adults without any kids. Therefore, an extra USD 64 was required to be paid. It seems our order was sold to Booking. com by Agoda. We spent around 9 hours trying to resolve this issue between Agoda and the Vinhoildays which was very tiring and frustrating, as the hotel refused to connect with Agoda. We were supposed to enjoy the holiday, not spend 9 hours arguing.

2. **Staff Attitude**

The staff was neither helpful nor respectful. As customers, we shouldn't have to guess which is your direct agent. If your staff are not prepared to communicate with other hotel agents, please only sell your hotel rooms through your own website or impose strict restrictions on your hotel agents. Agoda stated they called and emailed the hotel but received no response. Agoda also said they urged "Booking. com" to resend the booking confirmation to include the kids, yet the staff insisted they received nothing. Finally, at 7 PM, they agreed to let us pay the USD 64 at the reception and then we submit a request for a refund to "Booking. com" through Agoda. It was exhausting to deal with the staff, as they handled the case passively.

3. **Key Issues**

When we returned to the hotel after a night show, the key card was not working, and we had to go back to the reception. The staff member who handled our case during the day saw us and then walked away, forcing us to wait for another staff member to reset the key. This treatment was disrespectful.

4. **Breakfast Confusion**

During breakfast, the staff claimed we hadn't paid for it, but fortunately, they confirmed a few minutes later that we had. It really felt like I hadn't paid for my booking at all.

Overall, this was the worst hotel experience I've ever had. I wouldn't recommend this hotel to others.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Wai,
We appreciate the time you spent to share your experience with us!
Please accept our sincere apologies for the unpleasant experience you encountered during your stay. We wish that you had had only wonderful memories with us, however, it is so regrettable that we failed in delivering it to you. We wish we could have addressed the issues earlier to prevent any inconvenience caused to you. We sincerely thank you for bringing the matters to our attention, we are certain to work on it seriously to avoid similar occurrences in the future.
Thank you very much and we all look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.
Best Regards,
Vo Anh Phi
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Incredible surcharge for kid.
sample_comments.text:
Not recommend this hotel.
I have booked a suite room and a twin room for my family of 3 adults and 2 children 5 and 7 years old including the vin wonder tickets. 
The hotel said to me the capacity for each room is two adults and I have to pay extra half price of the booking price just for my 5 year old boy. 
It's not fair. Instead of staying for two adults, I stayed with my two kids without extra bed. The vin wonder ticket for an adult is more expensive than a child. They even didn't paid me back to down price of ticket, and just charge me with incredible price for a little kid.
Not happy at all.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs Annie,
We appreciate the time you spent to share your experience with us!
Please accept our sincere apologies for the unpleasant experience you encountered during your stay. We would like to explain the problem you encountered as follows:
You book a room for 2 people, and the hotel's policy is that children 4 years and up will pay an additional fee (with or without bed it dependent on your choice). This surcharge depends on the package you book, which is why you have to pay an additional ticket for your son. Our hotel's surcharge rates are public on the website. We sincerely thank you for bringing the matters to our attention.
Thank you very much and we all look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.
Best Regards,

Vo Anh Phi
General Manager

sample_comments.title: 3 family rooms
sample_comments.text:
STAY FROM 30TH OCT - 1ST NOV. TAKEN 3 FAMILY ROOM. ROOM SIZE IS GOOD.We were tge group of 10 people with kids. 5 among them were vegeterian n 5 were non-veg.We booked the property for 2 night. While checking as we landed very early we asked reception team that should we have our breakfast now as we will check out early morning like 6 am after 2 days. We were told that give a reminder 1 day before at evening before checking out. Than when we called and asked for 5 veg n 5 non-veg breakfast , firstly they denied then after 10-15 mins discussion they agreed to give us breakfast. BUT ALL NON VEG. SIMPLY DISGUSTING. EVEN 1 NIGHT BEFORE DEMANDED COFFEE THAT WAS ALSO NOT PROVIDED. HANGING CLEAN MY ROOM MEANS ONLY FLODING THE BLANCKETS AND DOES'NT MEAN CLEANING CUP, BROOMING SHEETS AND MOPPING FLOOR. CLEANINESS DOES'NT EXSIST IN DECTIONERY OF VIN HOLIDAYS FIESTA. 
BETTER TO BOOK WANAYAD GROUP JUST ASIDE VIN HOLIDAYS. WANAYAD HAD VERY GOOD WATER PARK N DIRECT CONNECTIVITY WITH BEACH.
ADDITIONALLY, THE HOTEL HAS FULL INDIAN MENU BUT IN BREAKFAST SPREAD WE HAD ONLY SAMBHAR- RICE OR VEG CURRY- WITH MAIDA READY TO EAT ROTI. ONLY PINEAPPLES IN FRUIT. CEREAL ONLY CORNFLAKES N 1 FOR KIDS. NO HOT MILK. NO COFFEE MACHINE TO HAVE GOOD COFFEE OR EAT. 
I HAD OVERALL BAD EXPERIENCE AND WOULD NOT RECOMMEMD

sample_comments.title: Tận thu... Mà thôi... Phú Quốc mà... Bạn biết đấy...
sample_comments.text: Mình đi nhiều resort đa phần các bé tầm 8 tuổi ở miễn phí nếu không sử dụng giường phụ, khoản phụ thu thêm là cho bữa sáng. Fiesta 3 sao phụ thu 2 bé 2 tuổi và 8 tuổi hẳn 800k, cao hơn nhiều resort 4 5 sao nên mình thấy chưa hợp lý, thắc mắc thì được trả lời chung chung là chính sách chung chung của khách sạn, và mình cũng chẳng có cơ hội được nhìn sơ qua cái chính sách ấy. Không lẽ bù thêm tí thuê luôn 2 phòng, đi chơi vợ chồng chia nhau mỗi người 1 bé sinh hoạt riêng.

sample_comments.title: Not a good value for money
sample_comments.text:
My honest review - 
-location : the hotel is located at farther northern end where there is not much ( except of VIN wonders ) . It is too far from the more beautiful southern end. ( From airport / southern end one way it's 500k vnd each time in a private car so you are losing money there ) . So all in all not a good location).

- value for money : We traveled from Sydney Australia. For a very basic room , 3 nights ( we spent *** - Dec 31-3 Jan ). So I would say , it's super expensive. Not at all worth it. Worse part - expectation of staff that you have to pay everything upfront ( what happened to setting the account on checkout day ) example - breakfast , pay in advance; laundry - pay in advance. So it leaves a very poor taste that the hotel is not trusting its guests at all.
- even more so , our Agoda booking said breakfast was included in price, hotel said it's not and that Agoda itself has booked through another third party. I have to take this up with Agoda separately. Basically we had to sort additional ***for 2 days breakfast for 2 adults.
All in all , can't recommend this hotel. Very poor experience
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Prashant,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and disappointment you experienced.
Regarding your comments about the location, we understand that it may not have met your expectations. The hotel's location is clearly stated on all booking platforms, and we regret that nearby attractions did not provide the experience you were hoping for.
Concerning the breakfast inclusion, we have reviewed your booking details in our system. Your reservation was not made directly through Agoda but was processed via another third-party partner. The confirmation we received indicated that breakfast was not included in your booking. If you believe there has been an error, we kindly ask you to provide the booking confirmation voucher so we can verify and assist you further.
Your feedback about payment policies and overall experience has been shared with our management team. We are committed to improving communication

sample_comments.title: Breakfast Table Management Improvement Suggestion
sample_comments.text:
The breakfast has a wide variety of food, but the dining area is very crowded during peak hours. My table was cleared twice while I was still eating, as staff assumed I had finished when I briefly left to get more food.

I would suggest placing a small table sign for guests to indicate whether they are still eating or finished. This could help avoid misunderstandings and improve the dining experience.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Mrs. SHU-MEI,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc.

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback with us. We are pleased to know that you appreciated the variety of our breakfast offerings.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused during your dining experience, especially when your table was cleared while you were still using it. We understand how this could have been frustrating.

Your suggestion regarding the use of table signs to indicate whether guests are still dining is truly valuable. This has been shared with our team for consideration as we continuously look for ways to improve our service, especially during peak hours.

We truly appreciate your constructive feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an even better experience in the future.

Best regards,
Hotel Management

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay enhanced by kind staff, though a few improvements are needed.
sample_comments.text:
Pros:
Great location within walking distance to Grand World, with a hotel buggy service available at 50K VND. Rooms were spacious and clean. Breakfast options for vegetarians were limited, but the restaurant manager went out of the way to arrange something special for us, which we truly appreciated. Service levels and attitude were excellent.

Cons:
The pool was closed due to ongoing work, though guests were given access to the Wyndham Hotel pool until 7 pm. The hotel offers Indian food on the à la carte menu, but I recommend double-checking before ordering --- our dishes were not authentic or prepared as expected. To their credit, the staff immediately refunded us on the spot.

Overall:
We were satisfied with our stay and would be happy to return.

sample_comments.title: Not recommend for indians
sample_comments.text:
Here's a rewritten review with some minor edits for clarity and grammar:

*Disappointing Stay at Vin Fiesta*

I had a poor experience at Vin Fiesta. The staff was uncooperative and unfriendly. When I asked for a water bottle, they told me it was chargeable. I was also denied a knife to cut fruits, with the staff citing hotel policies.

The breakfast spread was disappointing, with no Indian food options available.

When I inquired about purchasing Vinworld tickets, I was told I couldn't buy them because I only had a one-day booking. When I asked about extending my stay, I was informed that all family rooms were booked. I requested accommodation for my family in one room with an extra bed, but was told I would have to book two separate rooms.

As a parent, I was concerned about leaving my 9-year-old child alone in a separate room. Unfortunately, the staff was unsympathetic and unhelpful.

Overall, my experience at Vin Fiesta was very disappointing.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Devakar,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc.

Thank you for your feedback. We're truly sorry to hear that your experience at our hotel did not meet your expectations. We also regret that our breakfast offerings didn't meet your needs, and we will consider adding Indian food options to ensure a better experience. To ensure the safety of all our guests, the hotel does not provide sharp objects such as knives for use in the rooms. However, we are happy to assist with fruit cutting if needed. Additionally, as stated in the hotel policies provided to you at check-in, we do not sell tickets for use on the check-out day. You can purchase tickets through the Vinwonders app, the Vinpearl website, or directly at the ticket counter. We regret that the room category you were staying in has been fully booked, and we were unable to accommodate your request for a late check-out. Finally, we apologize if our staff did not clearly explain these details when responding to your req

sample_comments.title: Below expectation
sample_comments.text:
We visited Phu Qouc for 6 days 5 nights. 3 nights in the Sunset Town area and 2 nights at Vin Holiday Fiesta

 The room is clean and big, the AC is cold, there is a TV, cooler, hair dryer and safety box as well as a balcony. We ordered a room with 1 bed, but it turned out to be 2 single beds put together with sheets that weren't the right size, also the electrical sockets were not in a standard location. .

 There are several suggestions for Vin Holiday Fiesta:
 When making a booking via Agoda it says on the voucher that it includes airport transfer but when emailed to the hotel it states there is no airport transfer and you can use the free VIN bus or pick up at a cost by the hotel.

 The room door was broken on the second day and we had to wait more than 30 minutes for repairs

 There must be clear rules for swimming pools, because when we were at the swimming pool, we saw a group of people entering the pool wearing full clothes, including wearing sandals, entering the pool. 

 Hospitality overall is good, what needs to be paid attention to is the hospitality at the Ola Coaster restaurant where there are some restaurant staff who are rude, especially when full of visitors

 If you want to go to the airport or go to the city, there is a free VIN bus with a schedule of 15 minutes.

 Based on our personal experience, we prefer the Sunset Town area if someone asks which area to stay in Phu Quoc
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Mulyadi Chandra Fleming,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc!
Thank you so much for your honest feedback, however, we are so regretful at your incomplete satisfaction about your recent stay at our hotel. We are looking forward to another opportunity to serve you better in the near future.

Best Regards,
Vo Anh Phi

The breakfast is really bad compared to even basic hotels for Vietnam. There's too much of a mix and not enough of Vietnamese food - they have just as much Korean and Russian food (which is apparently who they cater to now) as Vietnamese food which leads to not much of any. We ended up looking for more food after breakfast.

The grand world right behind the hotel is nice to walk around, but expect tourist prices. Actually the entire island is tourist prices, which for us anyway, there are better places to go for the same money, like Nha Trang and Da Nang.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
The standard room with a pool view is decent. The room is small as shown in the picture, equipped with very basic amenities suitable for families just needing a clean and basic space. The staff are very friendly; however, their enthusiasm in addressing customer requests is only average. My husband asked the staff to check the TV remote as it was nearly broken, having fallen and broken before, with buttons not working, and we had to ask twice but no one came to help. (Since we have a small child, I wanted the child to watch TV for a bit of entertainment while the parents had personal work time).

Regarding breakfast, there are very few dishes, with one closed serving area, though some Vietnamese dishes like bánh canh, hủ tiếu, and phở gà are edible. In terms of location, I think if the goal is to visit Vinwonder and Safari, Vinholiday is quite okay as a mid-range, clean hotel. But for a long stay in Phú Quốc, the downside is that there are few good local food options, and you have to eat at Grandworld, which is very expensive. If you search hard, there is "Tiệm cơm Tộ", which has reasonable prices and is clean and tasty. The rest are mostly lesser-known brand restaurants with very high prices. For example, 150,000 VND for vegetable soup.

So everyone should consider carefully based on their needs. But no matter what, I am quite happy as the room is clean and fits the goal of traveling economically this time.

sample_comments.title: Its good only when you travelling with kids and family
sample_comments.text:
The property is huge and amazing!

What I liked:

1. Clean and well-maintained property.
2. Exceptional service staff (not reception). When we accidentally locked the twin room, a staff member heroically climbed the balcony to fix it.
3. Convenient location, just a 2-minute walk to VinWonders.
4. Free transport buses and tuk-tuks, great for large groups.

What could be improved:
1. Reception staff lacked knowledge about tourist spots beyond VinWonders and openly admitted it.
2. Reception seemed robotic and unengaging, offering minimal responses like "Yes," "No," or "I don't know."
3. Buffet staff appeared stressed.
4. Overall, staff seemed focused on tasks but lacked warmth and interpersonal skills.

The hotel could benefit from better hospitality training.

sample_comments.title: If it had come at a cheaper price...
sample_comments.text: Maybe because it's a resort, the pool bar prices were reasonable compared to other hotels, and the location is good. The staff were friendly. However, I was dissatisfied with the room considering the price I booked at, which was about 2.5 times higher. It was the most inconvenient experience I've had using a hairdryer while traveling (you have to keep pressing it to use it, which is really uncomfortable). The space at the vanity and other areas was small. On the first day, only hand towels were provided, and when I requested bath towels, they brought a towel smaller than the standard hand towel, which I just accepted. But the next day, after housekeeping, they had set up the standard hand towels. I wondered why that was the case on the first day. I wanted to use room service, but there was no separate guide in the room, and when I tried to access it by scanning the QR code, the room service window wouldn't open, so I couldn't order anything in the end. There were convenient aspects, but there were also uncomfortable and lacking points. I think satisfaction will vary depending on how much you pay.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're glad to hear that you liked our pool bar prices, location, and found the staff friendly. However, we apologize for the issues you encountered with the room and amenities. We're sorry that the hairdryer and space in the room didn't meet your expectations, and we understand how inconvenient that must have been. We also regret the confusion with the towels and the difficulty accessing room service information. We will review these areas to ensure a better experience for future guests. We appreciate your comments and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again.

Good water pressure n hot water. They need to change the bath towels though too rough, the bath towel was small, no hand towel only wash cloth. sample_comments.title: The front desk staff are excellent
sample_comments.text:
The front desk staff are excellent, 
 very professional and helpful. They will go all out to assist the customer. I give 5 star to all the staff. Please keep up the good job.

The hotel is inside the Vin Grand world. So is easy to access to many restaurant and coffee shop. The European village is worth visiting. 

Now is the down side. 
I stay in the suite room, and there is only two power socket available. And one of them is inside the toilet. We have to take turn to charge our device. Very very inconvenient.

TV:
There is no movie channel on the TV. Yes, not even 1 movie channel to watch. 

If you can live with those two issue which I have highlighted, then this hotel will be a great choice to stay.

I tried all the switches and asked the front desk but noone seemed to have an answer why they kept glowing. Good TV channels and view to the ocean. Super close to shops and massage and a very short walk to grand world and the fireworks and light shows. Bus also leaves to the theme parks from the hotel. Would def stay here again

sample_comments.title: Room size small
sample_comments.text:
I had booked two pool-side connected rooms (family rooms). Unfortunately, the hotel did not have staff available to help drop our luggage in the rooms. We were told to wait for 30 minutes, even though our check-in time was 11:30 PM.

The room size was very small, and the bathroom was also quite small. The shower area was extremely cramped, and there were no proper accessories or shelves in the bathroom to place toiletries. Additionally, the shower was broken and not working. After I reported this issue, the service team arrived only after 30 minutes.

The balcony view was excellent, which was the only positive aspect of the room.

The buffet breakfast was not authentic. Items like brinjal sanji and chappalkadu were served for breakfast, which was very surprising and disappointing.

The hotel provides tuk-tuk service, but it is chargeable and available only every 30 minutes. You can easily get a tuk-tuk from outside at almost 50% lower prices and with immediate availability.

Overall, the experience did not meet expectations.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely apologize that your stay did not meet your expectations and for the inconveniences you encountered.
 
We truly regret the delay in assisting with your luggage and the waiting time for technical support when the shower was not working. This is certainly not the level of service we strive to provide, and we understand how frustrating this must have been.
 
We are also sorry to hear that the room size, bathroom layout, and lack of proper amenities did not meet your comfort needs. Your comments regarding the cramped shower area and missing shelves for toiletries are well noted and will be shared with the relevant teams for review and improvement.
 
While we are glad that you enjoyed the balcony view, we deeply regret that other aspects of the room experience overshadowed this positive point. Regarding the breakfast, we apologize that the selection did not match your expectations in terms of

sample_comments.title: best location but average hotel room and service
sample_comments.text:
We had stay for 3 nights at this place during our stay in phuquoc grand world area. The hotel is very big and they have so much crowd during our stay as almost fully occupied.

When we arrived at the hotel reception staff had done the entry part and took our face scan for the breakfast entry. Even the hotel was big and four star nobody helped with the luggage to take it in room. Simply they provided the room key and asked to do it our self even though we were having baby.

Room was smaller one but having all good facilities which required in any hotel room. The view of the room was road facing but you will not get to see anything except forest and sea. Also till midnight you will see tuktuk and taxi drivers waiting on road. This makes room little unsecured. 

Best part of the staying at this hotel is it very near to the grand world. Just take walk from back of hotel for 3-4 minutes and you can reach grand world shops, teddy museum. Walk of 10 minutes takes you to the river taxi, grand world garden and main attractions. Also vin bus have bus stop at this hotel so you no need to have airport shuttle. 

Breakfast at this hotel was not good for indians. We have to be dependent on only fruits and egg during our whole stay even though they have many indian guest. They should start making atleast one indian dish for breakfast by looking at the no indian visitors staying here. 

The hotel having kids play area, which our child enjoyed a lot. It was great to play with balls and other activity based games. They do take of kids properly in the supervised way. 

Also it was raining heavily but hotel can not provide umbrella even it was available as it was returned just in-front of us by other tourist. This was kind shameful behaviour by staff otherwise stay here was average. 4 star to this property just because of location.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Mrs Sumit S. Thakur,
Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc and thank you for taking time to share your experience at our property!
Please kindly understand that we always strive for improvement in order to exceed guest's expectation. We would like to respond to your inquiry as follows:
On the day of check-in, you left your luggage outside the hotel's luggage area, and we did not receive any request for luggage assistance from you. When you requested an umbrella, we informed you that only one wet umbrella, recently returned by the previous guest, was available, and you chose to use your own umbrella. With high determined spirit from our whole team, we do trust that all mentioned issues will surely be improved for better experiences in the future. On behalf of the team, we deeply apologize for the unexpected affection you had during your vacation.
Thank you for your sharing and hopefully we will still have another chance to welcome you back at the soonest!

Best regards

sample_comments.title: Family-Friendly Stay Near Markets and Restaurants
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Vin Holidays Fiesta Hotel for 3 nights in May 2026 with our toddler. The hotel is a large 4-star property with a very good location, 1 min walk to grand world , surrounded by markets and restaurants which made it convenient for us. The swimming pool is large and the overall amenities are good.
The breakfast buffet had a good variety, although for Indian travellers there was only one Indian option and the taste was not very satisfying. I think the hotel would benefit from having an Indian chef.
The main area where I felt improvement is needed is customer service. Since it is a 4-star hotel, I expected better hospitality. We had requested an early check-in at 1 PM because we were travelling with a toddler. The staff told us they would inform us once the room was ready, but eventually we only received the room at the standard 3 PM check-in time. What disappointed us more was that we noticed some other travellers were being given early check-in.
Overall, the stay was decent --- not bad, but not exceptional either. If you are getting this hotel for under ₹3000 per night, then it is definitely value for money considering the size, location, and facilities of the property.
sample_comments.response:

At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your comments regarding the breakfast variety and your suggestion about Indian cuisine options. Your feedback has been carefully noted and shared with our culinary team for further consideration as we continuously strive to better accommodate the preferences of our international guests.

sample_comments.title: Review for Vinholidays Fiesta Phú Quốc
sample_comments.text:
The hotel has a great atmosphere, and one of the best parts is that you can move around and explore different areas freely at any time, which makes the stay more enjoyable. The swimming pool is quite good, well-maintained, and perfect for relaxing.

The food quality is also good, with a decent variety available. For Indian travelers, it is a big advantage that Indian restaurants are located nearby, making dining convenient.

There was a minor issue on the first day, as there was no water supply in the morning, possibly due to a damaged water line. This can be inconvenient, especially during early morning routines. However, this seemed to be a temporary issue and was resolved later.

Apart from this, everything else was smooth and comfortable. Overall, it's a good place to stay and I would recommend it for a relaxing trip.

sample_comments.title: Nice stay
sample_comments.text:
The location of the hotel is good and convenient, and the room itself was clean and well-maintained.

However, there are several drawbacks. The internet connection is very poor and not reliable at all, which can be a major issue. The check-in time is quite late --- they provided the room only at 3 PM, which felt inconvenient.

Additionally, there are quite a few restrictions. Guests are not allowed to dry clothes on the balcony, and outside food is not permitted in the rooms, which can limit flexibility during the stay.

Overall, while the location and room quality are positives, the experience is impacted by poor internet and restrictive policies.

sample_comments.title: Family trip with parents
sample_comments.text: I went on a family trip with my parents in their 40s and stayed for 2 nights. It's very convenient to walk around Grand World, so it's great for eating and exchanging money. However, during check-in and check-out, it feels very crowded and chaotic. Even though we went during the low season in the second week of March, there were no available seats for breakfast, and they couldn't clear the tables quickly, so it would be better to go early or late. The location to Vin Wonders, Safari, and Grand World is almost unbeatable, so it seems like a good trip if you're with parents or kids! The room was generally quiet and clean, but there was really nothing in it... besides toilet paper in the bathroom, there weren't any napkins or trash bins. It was tidy! The lobby was quite bustling, but they brought things to us quickly when we requested, which was nice.

sample_comments.title: 3-star hotel, just upgraded, many services not updated yet.
sample_comments.text:
The room is quite new, clean, and of a reasonable size. The price is relatively cheap because I booked on the app early, however, when rebooking it wasn't specified whether breakfast was included, leading my group to mistakenly think it was included in the room rate.

The front desk staff is quite friendly. A downside is that the bellmen primarily stand greeting guests and directing them, and do not assist with carrying luggage to the rooms, especially for families with elderly or young children.

There is no welcome drink like at other 3-4 star hotels.

Room cleanliness is good, with quick and thorough cleaning, and the staff is polite.

The breakfast buffet has a lot of dishes, but there are quite few that Vietnamese people can eat, and the quality is at an acceptable level---not too bad, but also nothing outstanding.

The location is convenient if you plan to visit Grandworld, Safari, etc.

sample_comments.title: Excellent

Plus, if you book for more than two days, you get free tickets to VinWonders and the Safari. Overall, it's a nice and clean place. However, the housekeeping could be better, as they often don't replace items or clean thoroughly. Other than that, everything is fine."

sample_comments.title: A good hotel in Grand World
sample_comments.text: The hotel has a great staff. The rooms are nice, but could use some paintings or other wall decorations to make it feel less sterile. I could hear my neighbors sometimes so glad I brought ear plugs. The location is good for Grand World attractions. There is a FREE electric bus from the airport that stops across from the hotel (routes 17 and 19). Many stores in the area are still closed. Prices are higher than the central part of the island so I suggest visiting restaurants and stores away from Grand World if you have time.

Kính gửi Quý khách Nguyễn Thị Ánh Tuyết,

Đầu tiên cho phép khách sạn VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc được gởi lời chào nồng ấm đến Quý khách và gia đình. Rất cảm ơn Quý khách vì đã dành thời gian quý giá của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại khách sạn chúng tôi.
Với những người làm nghề dịch vụ, niềm vui và sự hài lòng của Quý khách là món quá vô giá và là mục tiêu lớn nhất mà chúng tôi ngày ngày hướng đến. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ tiếp tục miệt mài làm việc, nâng cao chất lượng để mang lại những sản phẩm dịch vụ tốt hơn nữa đến Quý khách hàng.
Một lần nữa chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách và hẹn gặp lại Quý khách vào một ngày không xa.
Kính chúc Quý khách cùng gia đình mạnh khỏe và hạnh phúc!

sample_comments.text:
Child age 4above, VND220k pernight charge. Even if you not require extra bed. hotel policy. Just imagine if you stay 5night? 

Bed- Very hard, my whole body pain
Location super good (quick walk to Grandworld.
Hairdryer - Your hand will get pain, require to Tap.

Staff polite

sample_comments.title: Great stay!
sample_comments.text: This hotel is great if you're looking for a nice relaxing getaway. It is very resort like. Beautiful lobby and large swimming pool with lots of chairs and umbrellas. Lifeguards are there as well. It is in the north part of the island so very far away from the city centre. There is a beach close by but it does not have much of a shoreline or anywhere to relax so it'a not really a beach where you can go relax for the day (biggest down side). Only went there to catch the sunset. Great location if you want to stay in that area and around grand world. However if you prefer to be closer to the city, then would not recommend as it's about a 35 minute ride and is not that cheap via grab or taxi.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Amanda,

Warm greetings from VinHolidays Fiesta Phu Quoc!

Overall the hotel is very clean, breakfast is very delicious, the facility is really good.

Accesul la telecabina pe cablu cu regret l-a m ratat, căci e prevăzută o oră de încidere mult prea devreme 17:00 ! Am luat un taxi spre sația telecabinei, dar când am ajuns accesul nu mi s-a permis. La recepție putea să mă preîntâmpine despre programul de lucru a tele-cabinei, pentru a putea reconstrui itinerarul în funcșie de programul existent. În rest totul a fost OK.

sample_comments.title: Good location
sample_comments.text:
It's located near Grand world where the Venice-like canal and many shops are located. Also near teddy bear museum, and eateries. Bedding is just ok, with each person only one pillow. We had pool view and connecting rooms. Staff at check-in a bit rigid with hotel rules. There is paid shuttle service to VinWonders and VinPearl
safari. If your group is more than one person, it's cheaper to take taxi. Many taxis outside hotel. The hotel has many visitors so breakfast is crowded, however the food is refilled quickly. Would recommend this place.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our convenient location near Grand World, nearby attractions, and the ease of transportation around the area. We are also pleased that you appreciated the pool view, connecting rooms, and the efficiency of our breakfast refill service despite busy periods.
 
We regret if the bedding comfort and the number of pillows did not fully meet your expectations, as well as if the check-in experience felt a bit rigid. Your comments have been noted and shared with the relevant teams to help us improve both comfort and service flexibility.
 
Regarding transportation, we appreciate your practical suggestion, as different options may suit different group sizes and travel needs.
 
Thank you once again for your honest and constructive feedback. We truly value your recommendation and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for an even more enjoyable stay in the future.

sample_comments.title: It's also worth a try.
sample_comments.text:
I traveled with a friend. Upon arrival, it might be a bit surprising because the check-in/check-out luggage is left outside the lobby. No welcome drink. The check-in/out process is also quick and straightforward.

In the room, it has a bit of a smell, but opening the balcony helps. The phone support staff is very quick and enthusiastic. The room is quite large, but there are a few towels and the wifi is quite weak.

Good location because it's easy to catch the Vinbus and close to entertainment spots.

The breakfast restaurant is very crowded, with quite limited dishes; that morning, I hardly ate anything.
sample_comments.response:
Kính chào Quý khách Trần Nguyễn Hồng Anh,

Đầu tiên cho phép khách sạn VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc được gởi lời chào nồng ấm đến Quý khách và gia đình. Rất cảm ơn Quý khách vì đã dành thời gian quý giá của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại khách sạn chúng tôi.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách đánh giá nơi đây là "cũng đáng để thử" và đặc biệt ghi nhận những điểm tích cực như: sự hỗ trợ nhiệt tình của nhân viên, vị trí thuận tiện, cũng như quá trình check-in/check-out nhanh chóng.

Chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý chân thành về một số điểm chưa thực sự đáp ứng kỳ vọng, đây sẽ là cơ sở quan trọng để chúng tôi xem xét và cải thiện dịch vụ trong thời gian tới.

Một lần nữa, chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn khách sạn và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được phục vụ Quý khách chu đáo hơn trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo.

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản lý khách sạn 
VinHolidays Fiesta Phú Quốc

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel & friendly staffs
sample_comments.text:
We have our 4d3n holidays here. The staffs are friendly and patiently to answer all our queries. The hotel got provide the tuk tuk car pick up from Vinholidays parking T2 once you call the hotel to pick up. But unfortunately that I just bought the sim card by internet surfing and without the calling service. So pls make sure you have the calling service so that just can enjoy this pick up service well.

Perhaps the hotel can provide the auto hair dryer as pressing type is quite hard and tired to use. 

Their play room service is excellent and staffs are playing joyful with my child too. They enjoy so much at there. 

Swimming pool is nice and can enjoy the breakfast at the cafe besides the pool with nice view also. 

The most worthy are the free zoo tickets & Vinwonders entrance tickets attached with the room booking, convenient & value for money!
